reviews.comment:
Excelente calidad de sus productos,empleados,muy buena limpieza

(Translated by Google)
Excellent quality products, employees, and very good cleanliness

reviews.comment:
Que bien te atienden los playeros del.ACA CHASCOMUS PBA

(Translated by Google)
The staff at ACA Chascomús, PBA, provide excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXcWVMQUxREAE

reviews.comment:
Lugar ideal para parar. Amplio lugar para desayunar, almorzar, merendar o cenar. Siendo socio del ACA se obtienen beneficios. Zona para los chicos con hamacas, espacio al aire libre con mesas y sillas para descansar con lugar también para las mascotas. Baños muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Ideal place to stop. Spacious area for breakfast, lunch, afternoon tea, or dinner. ACA members receive benefits. Children's area with swings, outdoor space with tables and chairs for relaxing, and space for pets. Very clean restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXaWJUd0hREAE

reviews.comment:
Me encanta la confitería del ACA. Buen servicio,  baños impecables,  muy buena cocina.

(Translated by Google)
I love the ACA's confectionery shop. Great service, spotless bathrooms, and excellent food.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXNFptVDd3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Mejor dicho los peores sanguches de Chascomús. Abundante pero en general bastante feo.

(Translated by Google)
Or rather, the worst sandwiches in Chascomús. Plentiful but generally quite ugly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXZ2ZMWnFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Baños correctos.  Nada de lujo pero limpios y con papel. Es un lugar chico no ofrece más opción que una rápida parada técnica. Hay poca gente.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are adequate. Nothing fancy, but they're clean and have toilet paper. It's a small place, so there's no other option than a quick pit stop. There are few people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXZ2ZhU05nEAE
